recent_calls.summary: Eugenia called to request a callback regarding updating or replacing her dryer vent to fit a new washer and dryer. The agent confirmed the service details, scheduled a service appointment as soon as possible, and collected her contact and address information. Eugenia declined additional maintenance program information and provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and no further interaction before the user hung up.

The user called after hours and requested to speak with a live representative. The agent informed the user that no live representatives were available at that time, and the user decided to call back later.

Matthew called to confirm a previously submitted cooling service appointment scheduled for tomorrow afternoon. The after-hours agent, Evie, confirmed the details and informed him that a live agent would contact him the next business day to confirm. Matthew declined further assistance and ended the call.
The call was very brief and disconnected abruptly shortly after the agent introduced herself. There was no meaningful interaction or assistance provided during the call.

Kurtis called to schedule a cooling service for two air conditioning units: one making a loud noise and the other needing cleaning and summer preparation. He requested the service as soon as possible, ideally tomorrow, and confirmed it was not an emergency. The agent collected all necessary details and assured Kurtis that the team would confirm availability on the next business day.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself but the user hanging up immediately without any interaction.
The user called to schedule an appointment but ended the call abruptly after the agent asked for more details about the service and preferred timing.
The user called after hours requesting to speak to a live agent, but the assistant informed them that no live agents were available at that time. The call ended shortly after without further action.

The user, Christina, scheduled a routine air conditioner maintenance appointment for the twelfth, preferring either morning or afternoon. She confirmed it was not an emergency and had no special access instructions. Christina also requested information about home maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the guided experience.

The user called to schedule a service appointment for their grandmother's apartment to replace a leaking boiler. The agent confirmed details, booked the earliest available appointment for June 8th at 10 AM, and collected the landlord's contact information for payment. The user was satisfied with the service and provided positive feedback.

The user called to schedule a maintenance repair for their HVAC and mentioned they had already filled out an intake form. The agent attempted to assist but ultimately transferred the call to a live agent for scheduling. The call ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to report a cooling issue with their HVAC system that is running but blowing warm air. The agent gathered necessary details, confirmed the service request for the next day, and noted the user's interest in home maintenance program information. The call ended with the agent confirming a follow-up from the service team.
The user requested to speak with a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user, Chris from Hareth Insurance Consulting, called to request a renewal quote from Budget. The agent collected the user's contact information and assured that the appropriate team would follow up. The call ended with the user satisfied and no further questions.

The user called to inform that they received a message and are waiting for a technician to arrive. The agent attempted to connect the user with a live agent for further assistance and successfully transferred the call.
The user called and requested to speak to customer service. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent and successfully transferred the call.
The user requested to speak to a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.

The user called to update their phone number and inquire about scheduling a heating service. The agent confirmed the new number and attempted to schedule service but transferred the call to a live agent as the user requested to speak with a person. The call ended with a successful transfer to a live agent.

The user called to inquire about the scheduling of a repair for their air conditioning unit. The agent confirmed if it was an emergency and then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Janine from American Home Shield called to report that a unit is still not working because the breaker was not replaced during a previous service visit. The agent confirmed the issue, updated the member's contact information and service address, and assured Janine that the team would be contacted to resolve the issue. The call ended with no further requests from Janine.

The user called to get in touch with Richard, the service manager, who was supposed to call back. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to another agent who could assist further.

Celine from American Home Shield called to inquire about a previous service request related to an AC unit wiring issue after a compressor replacement. The agent confirmed the customer's details and assured that a technician would be scheduled to address the wiring problem. The call ended with the agent confirming the follow-up and the user expressing gratitude.

Mary from American Home Shield called to request a second opinion dispatch for an air conditioning unit that is not cooling. The agent confirmed the dispatch details, including the service address, contact numbers, and reason for the second opinion, and assured Mary that the team would reach out soon. Mary declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The call was initiated by the user, Jennifer, who presented a business financing offer to the agent. The agent attempted to engage but was cut off as the user delivered a scripted message and then the call ended abruptly. No further interaction or assistance was provided.

The user called to clarify scheduling details about air conditioning service and mentioned a previous conversation. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for further help.

The user called to schedule a cooling service appointment at 121 South Lindenwood Drive, Collinsville, Illinois, for the morning of June 5th. The agent confirmed the details including the user's contact number and email, and informed the user that a human agent would follow up soon. The call ended with the user confirming the information and no further questions.

The user inquired about the arrival time of a service person before 5:30 due to another appointment. The agent attempted to assist but transferred the call to a live agent for scheduling help. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The user returned a call from a voicemail message and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent facilitated the transfer without any issues.
The user called and requested to speak with Amy. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent named Amy and successfully transferred the call.

The user called after missing a previous call and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent acknowledged the user's situation and facilitated the transfer successfully.
The call was very brief with only the agent greeting the user and no further conversation. The user hung up shortly after the greeting without any interaction.
The call was very brief with only the agent greeting the user and no further conversation. The user hung up shortly after the greeting without any interaction.
The call was very brief and the agent attempted to engage the user, but the user did not respond and hung up shortly after. No service or information was exchanged.
The call was very brief and the agent attempted to engage the user, but the user did not respond and hung up shortly after.

The user called to inquire about an estimate for replacing a three-ton AC unit and was informed that a technician visit is needed for an exact quote. The user requested a ballpark estimate and scheduled an appointment for an evaluation on June 5th at 4 PM. The call ended with the user declining to provide feedback and the agent confirming the booking and next steps.

The user repeatedly requested to speak with an operator, and the agent attempted to transfer the call to a live agent as requested. The call was successfully transferred shortly after the user's request.
The user, Yolanda, called and requested to speak with someone. The agent, Sophie, promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

Bob called to schedule a service appointment for his air conditioning not cooling under his American Palm Shield home warranty. The agent collected all necessary details including the dispatch number and preferred timing, and confirmed the information with Bob. Bob declined information about maintenance programs and feedback requests, and the call ended with the agent confirming that someone will contact him soon.

The user called to schedule an immediate service visit for their sister's air conditioning unit, which was not cooling properly. The agent confirmed the service address, contact details, and the urgency of the request, and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would reach out shortly. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call.
The user called and requested to speak with Amy. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.

The user called to make a payment and requested to speak to Amy. The agent informed the user that billing information is not directly accessible and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.
The agent greeted the user and offered assistance, but the user indicated they needed to call back and ended the call shortly after. No specific service or information was discussed.

The user, Jaunice, scheduled a service appointment for a non-working cooling system at her home on Friday between 8 and 10 AM. The agent confirmed the booking and informed her about the dispatch fee. The user declined to provide feedback and ended the call politely.

Felicia from American Home Shield called Budget regarding a dispatch and provided the dispatch number. She requested to speak to a live agent, and the call was successfully transferred to another agent for further assistance.

The user called to set up a service appointment for their cooling system through American Home Shield, reporting that their AC unit is not coming on. The agent confirmed the details and informed the user that someone from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing would contact them shortly. The user declined information about maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the call experience.
The user called and requested to be connected with Dan Lagars. The agent attempted to transfer the call to the requested contact and successfully completed the transfer.
The user called and requested to speak with an operator. The agent promptly initiated a transfer to a live agent to assist the user further.
